project_context.name: Pankaj Mill Stores Price Lookup
project_context.description: Internal business app for instant price lookup and editing.
project_context.tone: Industrial, practical, distraction-free, robust, warm earthy.

colors.strategy: Archetype 1 (Organic/Earthy) mixed with Industrial Machinery. Rust Orange primary with Warm Stone background.

visual_enhancers.watermark: Faint large centered text watermark across the background. Content: 'PANKAJ MILL STORES'. Classes: `fixed top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[clamp(4rem,12vw,12rem)] font-black text-foreground/5 pointer-events-none select-none whitespace-nowrap z-0`
visual_enhancers.borders: Sharp, industrial edges. Modify tailwind.config.js variables to have radius 0 or 2px max.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders and slight background color shifts instead of soft shadows to maintain the raw industrial feel.

layouts.global: Distraction-free. Everything sits on top of the watermark (ensure relative z-10 for content containers).
layouts.hero_search: Massive search bar. Container: `w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto mt-20 md:mt-32 relative z-10`. Input should be `text-2xl md:text-5xl p-6 md:p-8 font-black border-b-4 border-primary bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 w-full`. No magnifying glass icon, just raw input placeholder 'Search product, brand, size...'
layouts.filters: Underneath search bar. Small pill chips. `flex gap-3 flex-wrap mt-6`. Pills: `px-6 py-2 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest border border-border hover:bg-muted cursor-pointer transition-colors`.
layouts.product_list: Vertical list of flat rectangular rows (not traditional cards). `flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center py-8 border-b border-border hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors gap-6`.
layouts.price_display: Two distinct blocks side by side on the right. Wholesale on left, Retail on right. Labels: `text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground block mb-1`. Prices: `text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-foreground font-heading`. Include ₹ symbol.
layouts.admin_csv_upload: Drag and drop zone `border-2 border-dashed border-primary bg-primary/5 p-12 text-center cursor-pointer`. Two explicit radio buttons or large toggle buttons below it: 'Replace All' vs 'Update Existing & Add New'.

components.inline_price_edit: For admins: when hovering over a price, show a subtle dashed underline and a faint pen icon next to it. On click, swap the text block with a naked input `<input type='number' autoFocus className='w-32 bg-transparent border-b-2 border-primary text-3xl font-black focus:outline-none text-foreground' />`. Save on blur or Enter key press.
components.auth_screen: Ultra minimal. Centered form. 'PANKAJ MILL STORES' as a massive H1. Username and Password inputs with industrial styling (thick bottom borders, no radius). Solid primary button `bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-black uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 w-full mt-4`.
components.navigation: Simple top bar. Left: 'Pankaj Mill Stores' (Text only, font-black). Right: 'Logout' (and 'Admin Panel' if admin). Background must be solid or heavy glassmorphism to sit clearly over the watermark.

motion.interactions: Hover states on rows: slight background change (`hover:bg-muted/30`). Fast, snappy transitions. `transition-colors duration-150`.
motion.loading: Skeleton loaders matching the row layout. No spinners.

accessibility.focus: High contrast focus rings for keyboard navigation. `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none`.

media.instructions: No images. The prompt explicitly says 'Text-only Pankaj Mill Stores branding (no logo image)'. Do not use placeholder images.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Inject the specified Google Fonts (Chivo for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body) into index.css and map them in tailwind.config.js.
2. Implement the color palette exactly as specified using HSL variables in index.css.
3. Set `border-radius` variables to `0` in tailwind config for a sharp industrial look.
4. The background MUST have the faint watermark: 'PANKAJ MILL STORES'. Put it fixed, centered, opacity 5%, `pointer-events-none`.
5. The search bar must be huge and instantly focused on page load (autofocus).
6. Build the inline click-to-edit feature for prices without using forms or modals. It should feel instant and inline.
7. Implement Simple Auth screen matching the industrial aesthetic.
8. Implement Admin CSV upload interface with the two specific logic buttons ('Replace all', 'Update existing + add new').
9. Use `lucide-react` for simple icons (edit pen, upload, check) but sparingly.
10. Ensure prices format with ₹ on the left (e.g. ₹ 1,200).
11. Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='search-input'`, `data-testid='price-inline-edit'`).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic, 'on distribution' outputs (AI slop). Make the frontend creative and distinctive.
Don't make generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients. Use the provided industrial brutalist guidelines.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. E.g. use p-8 or py-12 for rows.
Never apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in css.
No emojis for icons. Use lucide-react.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
